name: Chicken Kiev
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones and skin from chicken breasts and pound to 1/8 inch thickness.
2. Cut butter into quarters and lay one in the center of each chicken piece.
3. Evenly divide onions and parsley between breasts. Roll each into a log and secure with a toothpick.
4. Mix eggs and water. Roll each log in flour, then dip in egg wash and cover with bread crumbs.
5. Wrap securely in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or overnight.
6. Keep fried until brown, then bake at 375°F for 5 minutes.
